extracted: 2026-06-09T13:08:23.198Z
---

# Open Thread 437

**From:** Astral Codex Ten <astralcodexten@substack.com>  
**Date:** 2026-06-08T14:18:09.000Z

---

View this post on the web at https://www.astralcodexten.com/p/open-thread-437

This is the weekly visible open thread. Post about anything you want, ask random questions, whatever. ACX has an unofficial subreddit [ https://substack.com/redirect/cdf99605-5d4d-451e-ab80-ea1fb452b40c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ], Discord [ https://substack.com/redirect/f3d030ab-8b57-4d95-b0be-b31d905deca4?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ], and bulletin board [ https://substack.com/redirect/c4ad5e07-203c-417e-9f72-af0c4ab8eecf?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ], and in-person meetups around the world [ https://substack.com/redirect/01215dc6-d17e-4bf3-84ce-d8f8ae858e1f?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ]. Most content is free, some is subscriber only; you can subscribe here [ https://substack.com/redirect/0210e78b-110e-4f68-bcc8-9c4a3afca023?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ]. Also:
1: AI Security Bootcamp is a fully-funded program intended to help people get into AI-related cybersecurity. The current cohort will be in Las Vegas, August 2-8. Apply here [ https://substack.com/redirect/e4aedccb-ebb5-4edf-b078-dadd2a83ad9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ]. 
2: More detail now available on opposing the Save Our Bacon Act, which would ban most state animal-welfare and anti-farmed-animal-cruelty laws. Bentham’s Bulldog has a post making the case against here [ https://substack.com/redirect/3044a9a7-8b74-49ba-90e4-db74a0764759?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ], and Dwarkesh Patel here [ https://substack.com/redirect/e5fa6054-b367-4680-a26d-509edc2975ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ]. If you’re interested in pushing back can find your senators here [ https://substack.com/redirect/457b9e2a-06c9-47a9-a110-f77840f1a310?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ], and there’s a script for calling them here [ https://substack.com/redirect/4a0e4ed7-f2df-4f00-b61c-4cea31ab5e21?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ]. And opponents of the bill are uniting behind the American Meat Producers Association, a group of pro-animal-welfare small farmers; if you want to help financially, you can donate to their ad campaign here [ https://substack.com/redirect/b8917d4f-86f5-4291-a0b3-416932d9312a?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ]. Calls and donations are both pretty time-sensitive, and doing it this week would be much better than waiting.

Unsubscribe https://substack..iVEwfb6lg2XTiU6XJ27udyHX8rFEf3clMMCxOLn_Wis?

---
